content.problemStatement:
You are given arrays AAA and BBB of sizes NNN and MMM respectively, such that 1‚â§Bi‚â§N1\le B_i \le N1‚â§Bi‚Äã‚â§N.

For each 1‚â§i‚â§M1\le i \le M1‚â§i‚â§M:


Sort the suffix of length BiB_iBi‚Äã in array AAA in non-decreasing order.
Output the resultant array AAA after all operations.

Note that a suffix of length XXX denotes the subarray consisting of last XXX elements of the array.


Input Format

The first line consists of a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case consists of two space-separated integers NNN and MMM, denoting the sizes of arrays AAA and BBB.
The second line of each test case consists of NNN space separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã.
The third line of each test case consists of MMM space separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BMB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_MB1‚Äã,B2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,BM‚Äã.


Output Format
For each test case, output NNN space-separated integers, denoting the resultant array AAA after all operations.
constraints: The sum of NNN and MMM over all test cases would not exceed 2‚ãÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚ãÖ105 respectively.
